user_query:
I’m coordinating our supporters’ weekly update and want it to radiate good team spirit and our lucky rituals without being rambling. Please work entirely from the files under input/ and produce the following outputs under the specified paths:

1) Extract upcoming fixtures (next 3 by soonest date) from input/schedule.html into outputs/data/upcoming.json. The JSON must be an array of 3 objects with fields: date (YYYY-MM-DD), opponent, venue, competition, home_or_away (exactly "Home" or "Away"). Base these values strictly on the table in the HTML.

2) Summarize recent form from input/results.csv into outputs/data/last3_summary.csv. Consider the 3 most recent matches by date. Create a CSV with header "metric,value" and rows for: matches_analyzed, wins, draws, losses, goals_for_total, goals_against_total, goal_difference. Totals and goal_difference must match the last three rows by date in the input.

3) Create and run small scripts under tools/ that generate the files in (1) and (2) from the inputs. Name them clearly (e.g., tools/extract_fixtures.* and tools/summarize_results.*). The report and messages below should reflect the values in these generated outputs (not hand-typed), so that upcoming.json and last3_summary.csv can be used to cross-check accuracy.

4) Edit and rewrite input/rituals.md for clarity, consistency, and safety into outputs/docs/rituals_clean.md. Requirements: friendly, inclusive tone; one-sentence safety note at the top; convert to a numbered list; remove shouty casing and ambiguous punctuation; merge or rephrase to avoid contradictions with venue rules; keep the spirit of each item (e.g., left sock first, community scarf, clap 7 times after anthem, oranges at halftime, mantra, etc.).

5) Compose a concise weekly update at outputs/reports/weekly_update.md with exactly three sections in this order: "Upcoming Fixtures (Next 3)" listing date, opponent, venue, and H/A for each item from outputs/data/upcoming.json; "Form Snapshot (Last 3)" summarizing wins/draws/losses and goal difference consistent with outputs/data/last3_summary.csv; "Rituals Spotlight" listing the first three numbered items from outputs/docs/rituals_clean.md verbatim.

6) Rewrite input/rambling_post.txt into a 120–160 word group chat post saved to outputs/messages/group_chat_post.txt. Make it energetic but clear and not shouty. Include: the exact date and opponent of the next match from outputs/data/upcoming.json; a friendly reminder to wear blue socks and bring the community scarf; the "clap 7 times after the anthem" cue; and a brief nod to following stadium rules. Do not invent facts—use only the inputs.

7) Draft a simple text email to the fan list at outputs/messages/email_to_fans.txt with a "Subject:" line and a "Body:". The body must include a warm greeting; the first upcoming fixture’s date, opponent, venue, and H/A; a one-line form summary using wins/draws/losses from outputs/data/last3_summary.csv; a short positive mantra in quotes; and a reminder to review the cleaned rituals. Keep it upbeat and inclusive.

Notes and constraints:
- Use only data parsed from input/schedule.html and input/results.csv for fixtures and form. Do not invent or alter team details.
- Ensure all numbers/dates in the report and messages match outputs/data/upcoming.json and outputs/data/last3_summary.csv exactly.
- All output files must be created at the specified paths so they can be checked against the inputs and each other. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
